containsText: Build and verify only the fixture-independent foundation for Kea's credential-free Milestone 12 demo while deliberately deferring the approved sanitized fixture, public demo command, and completion claim.

Captured result and repository evidence supports that commit b685c95 contains the isolated demo-orchestration foundation, the working tree was clean, all 133 tests passed, and no final fixture or public demo package script had been added.

Codex reported that the fixture-independent Milestone 12 foundation was committed and verified with 133 passing tests, while the final fixture-backed demo assets and command remained intentionally unfinished.

The human bounded the work to fixture-independent demo infrastructure, required design approval before edits, prohibited final fixture assets and completion claims, and required isolation from real observer data.
The human narrowed the approved design by deferring the public demo command and constraining the extracted boundary and output-root behavior.
The narrowing correction redirected the work from a broader preliminary demo proposal to the isolated fixture-independent orchestration that was subsequently implemented.

The recording cannot establish that the final credential-free reference demo works end to end because the approved fixture, deterministic expected outputs, and public demo command were intentionally deferred to later work.

The committed work is supported as a reviewable foundation rather than a completed Milestone 12 deliverable; release readiness still depends on adding and verifying the approved fixture-backed, credential-free demo.
doesNotContainText: A dispensable unsupported approach included to demonstrate rejection of a nonexistent citation.
